metadata.title: Unified Astrological Analysis Methodology Master Engine
metadata.objective: Create a single expanded methodology for astrological analysis, extraction, delineation, verification, weighting, strength calculation, synthesis, interpretation, statistical export, and detailed reporting by ingesting the full AI Drive corpus.
metadata.processing_scope: All user-accessible AI Drive files except internal sandbox cache directory
special_handling_notes: One mislabeled PDF was identified as a PNG image and processed with OCR.
One MHT web archive required email-part HTML extraction instead of plain text parsing.

largest_files.path: Astrology Analysis_ The Composition of the Birth Chart and the Deep Symbolic System of the Twelve Zodiac Signs - Oreate AI Blog.mht

master_engine.purpose: Ingest heterogeneous astrology source files into a normalized knowledge engine that supports repeatable chart analysis and later statistical analysis.

deduplication.policy: retain all files in inventory for provenance, but prefer clearer text renditions over PDF duplicates for downstream extraction when content is identical

normalization: tag topics from file name and content
store per-file metadata, counts, and excerpts
ingestion_rules.master_injection: Each processed file is appended to source_inventory and contributes to topic frequencies, evidence selection, and methodology synthesis.

loop_controller.termination_condition: stop only when every discovered file has metadata, extracted text or OCR fallback, topic tags, and inventory record
loop_controller.incremental_reingestion_policy: Future files can be appended by rerunning the same loop; only changed/new hashes need reprocessing for efficiency.

phase_01_ingestion_and_preflight.goal: Capture every source and normalize it into a processing-ready corpus.
steps: Enumerate every AI Drive file recursively.
Detect real media type rather than trusting file extension.
Extract text, tabular values, or OCR text as needed.
Record metadata including size, extension, hash, char count, word count, topics, and excerpt.
Re-run fallbacks until every file is represented in the master inventory.

phase_02_chart_data_extraction.goal: Turn raw source material into structured astrological facts.
extract_entities: asteroids, fixed stars, lots/Arabic parts, nodes, Vertex/Anti-Vertex
chart type flags (natal, synastry, transit, progression, composite, draconic, horary, financial, etc.)

time: convert source time to UTC when possible
retain local time and timezone provenance
coordinates: store longitude/latitude in decimal and dms if available
store zodiac sign-degree-minute-second form alongside absolute longitude
normalization_rules.orb_policy: Always store exact separation, allowed orb, and normalized orb ratio.

ordered_checks: Identify chart pattern and multi-planet geometry.
Locate Ascendant, Midheaven, Descendant, IC, chart ruler, and closest angular planets.
Evaluate planets by sign, house, rulership, dispositorship, combustion/cazimi, speed, retrogradation, and benefic/malefic contact.
Add special points only after the structural chart skeleton is clear.
phase_03_delineation_framework.narrative_rule: Interpret what the planet is, how it acts by sign, where it manifests by house, and what it governs by rulership before adding aspect complexity.

phase_04_ephemeris_verification.goal: Cross-check computed positions and chart structures with multiple external astronomical/astrological calculation sources.

verification_stack.role: Primary precision reference for planetary and lunar positions.
Independent online astrology calculator cross-check for chart outputs, returns, progressions, fixed stars, lots, and related tools.
Astronomical authority for high-precision object positions and coordinate validation.
Additional chart-construction cross-check covering chart types, house systems, aspect listings, midpoints, Arabic Parts, and dynamic hit lists.

verification_protocol: Normalize birth/event inputs, timezone, DST, coordinates, zodiac, house system, and node type before comparing outputs.
Check core planetary longitudes first, then angles/houses, then secondary objects and derived points.
If sources disagree, verify whether the difference comes from house system, true vs mean node, tropical vs sidereal zodiac, topocentric vs geocentric settings, or delta-T handling.
Escalate unresolved discrepancies to JPL Horizons for astronomical coordinate confirmation on core bodies.
Store both raw outputs and discrepancy notes in the report for auditability.

phase_05_weighting_model.goal: Prioritize factors so interpretation follows relative power rather than a flat checklist.

weight_formulas.pattern_bonus_guideline: Add 5% to 10% when a planet participates in reinforced harmonic geometry or tightly integrated multi-planet patterns.

phase_06_strength_calculation_engine.goal: Convert qualitative condition into a reproducible numeric hierarchy.
phase_06_strength_calculation_engine.expanded_formula: total_power = positional_strength + aspectual_strength + harmonic_bonus + star_or_node_bonus + chart_type_modifier
subsystems: financial/event chart volatility emphasis when relevant

normalization.chart_level_scale: 0-1 normalized influence share and/or percentage power ranking
normalization.confidence_scale: 0-1 based on data completeness, exact birth time certainty, and cross-source agreement

phase_07_midpoint_harmonic_and_specializ.goal: Layer advanced techniques after the base chart hierarchy is established.

midpoints: use 90-degree sort and midpoint tree together
rank midpoint pictures by orb tightness and focal-point importance
prioritize Sun/Moon, angles, chart ruler, and repeated focal points
retain only meaningful combinations and exclude trivial self-referential equations
harmonics: identify repeated 4th-harmonic hard structures for tension and drive
note higher harmonic reinforcement where it repeats core natal themes
special_points: Arabic Parts / Lots with day-night reversals where applicable
fixed stars with tight conjunction policy and precession awareness
nodes, Vertex/Anti-Vertex, Chiron, major asteroids, draconic overlays, and horary degrees only when chart context supports their use

phase_08_synthesis_and_interpretation.goal: Move from isolated facts to a structured, conflict-aware narrative.
synthesis_order: derive chart backbone from Ascendant-ruler-Sun-Moon and strongest planets
group repeated themes across sign, house, aspects, and special points
resolve contradictions by ranking higher-strength factors above weaker modifiers
translate patterns into life themes, developmental tensions, timing triggers, and decision guidance
distinguish descriptive, predictive, and advisory statements
interpretive_principles: Do not interpret every factor with equal weight.
A strong repeated theme beats a single isolated symbol.
Applying/tight activations are treated as stronger timing triggers than wide/separating ones.
Use counseling language for options and developmental paths, but keep the technical basis explicit.

phase_09_statistical_export_and_csv_anal.goal: Produce machine-readable data for later analysis, benchmarking, and model refinement.
required_exports: chart-factor matrix CSV (for future chart runs)
analysis_use_cases: relationship between tight orbs and final thematic prominence

phase_10_detailed_reporting.goal: Generate reports that are both auditable and readable.

web_verified_sources.name: Astrodienst Swiss Ephemeris
key_points: High precision ephemeris developed by Astrodienst and based largely on NASA JPL DE431.
Covers extremely long time ranges and is suitable as a primary precision reference.
Provides multiple ephemeris modes and broad support for astronomical and astrological bodies.

web_verified_sources.name: Astro-Seek Ephemeris / Toolset
key_points: Provides ephemeris tables plus a wide tool ecosystem including natal, transit, secondary progression, synastry, draconic, asteroid, fixed-star, midpoint, and Arabic lot utilities.
Useful as an independent online cross-check for astrology-specific chart outputs.

web_verified_sources.name: NASA JPL Horizons
key_points: Customizable production of accurate ephemerides for observers, mission planners, researchers, and the public.
Supports many coordinate systems, time scales, and output types, making it a high-authority astronomical verification source.

web_verified_sources.name: Alabe / Solar Fire Chart Calculations
key_points: Lists chart-construction functions including natal, progressed, solar arc, composite, midpoint, Arabic Parts, and graphic ephemerides.
Useful as an additional implementation cross-check for chart types and reporting structures.

source_inventory_embedded.excerpt: // ACG Astro*Carto*Graphy // By Donald A. Bradley // I. Introduction WHAT IS A HOROSCOPE? In order to understand what your Astro*Carto*Graphy map means it's best to understand what a horoscope is. The planets, which seem to move constantly in the sky, do so because of two factors: their own orbits around the Sun, and the motion of the Earth in its daily rotation. A horoscope is just a map of the sky at the moment and place of birth, and no two are ever alike unless the individuals were born at the same time and place. If you have a conventional horoscope for yourself, you can see how it is just a map of the sky if you were born at around Noon, for example, the Sun symbol in your chart appears near the top, just as the Sun did in the sky at that moment of time, and the other planets are also as they appeared then. However if you had been born at the same time, but in a different place, the chart would change, since when it is Noon in Chicago, it is late afternoon in London, so the Sun in that theoretical chart would be in a different part of the horoscope altogether, and would symbolically have a different meaning. source_inventory_embedded.excerpt: Chiron Cycle Thursday, July 16, 2020 3:43 AM The Chiron Cycle and the Process of Awakening 06/05/2019Jessica Davidson In this series we’re exploring how Chiron initiates you onto the path of individuation through a process of wounding and healing that unfolds in stages. This process can be mapped using the Chiron Cycle of transits to itself as it moves around your horoscope. These transits trigger the experiences you need in order to become the person you’re meant to be. Chiron takes about 50 years to complete its orbit around the sun, but unlike other planets, it’s cycle is quite irregular. This is because its orbit is highly elliptical so it spends longer in some signs than others. For example, everybody will experience the Chiron Return at age 50, but the first sextile can happen at any time between ages 3 and 16 depending on the natal position of Chiron. source_inventory_embedded.excerpt: Component Description Astrological Meaning & Interpretation (Ea +Aa +Eb +Ab ) Essential and Accidental Dignities (E/A): The sum of the dignities (status and power) of the two bodies involved (Planet a and Planet b). A higher sum means the planets are inherently stronger and better situated to express their influence. A stronger foundation amplifies the final effect. Wasp Aspect Weight (Wasp ): A numerical value assigned to the specific aspect (e.g., conjunction, trine, square, etc.). This determines the nature and intensity of the influence. Positive weights (like for Trine, Sextile) suggest supportive, harmonious, or flowing energy (+0.8). Negative weights (like for Square, Opposition) suggest challenging, tense, or confrontational energy (−0.8). (1−orbmax orb ) Orb Factor: A linear reduction factor based on how close the aspect is to exact. orb is the actual separation, and orbmax is the maximum allowed separation. This ensures that tighter aspects have a stronger effect. When the aspect is exact (orb=0), the factor is 1, giving full strength. When the aspect is at the maximum orb (orb=orbmax ), the factor is 0, giving no strength. Helement Element Harmony Modifier (Helement ): A
